title: OFAC Designates Iran-Linked Entities and Individual to SDN List
summary: OFAC adds Seyyed Mohammed Mehdi Al Ghafur and multiple Iran-related companies to SDN List. Designations target entities in Dubai, China, and Iran involved in sanctions evasion. Action strengthens enforcement against Iran's petroleum sector.
contents:
## OFAC Designates Iran-Linked Entities and Individual to SDN List

### Overview
OFAC adds Seyyed Mohammed Mehdi Al Ghafur and multiple Iran-related companies to SDN List. Designations target entities in Dubai, China, and Iran involved in sanctions evasion. Action strengthens enforcement against Iran's petroleum sector.

### Event Details
OFAC designates Seyyed Mohammed Mehdi Al Ghafur, born March 22, 1991, in Qom, Iran, to the SDN List under Iran-related authorities. Al Ghafur holds Dominican passport RA126667 and Dominica nationality alongside Iranian citizenship. Treasury targets him due to connections with Iran's oil trade networks. OFAC adds ANKA ENERGY AND LOGISTICS COMPANY, located in Dubai's Business Bay and Marshall Islands, with IMO 0295422, for facilitating Iran oil shipments. TING TAO COMPANY LIMITED, based in Shanghai and Hong Kong with IMO 0198612, joins the list for similar Iran-related logistics support. Iranian firms AKU TEJARAT RAVIZH KISH COMPANY in Kish City and KARMANIYA TEJARAT ASAR KISH COMPANY in Kish Free Trade Zone receive SDN status. These companies, established in 2022 and 2019 respectively, engage in trade activities that evade sanctions. OFAC publishes new alert on sanctions risks with teapot oil refineries, warns entities against dealings. Designations expand SDN coverage to shadow networks supporting Iran's energy exports. Treasury continues enforcement against proliferation and terrorism financing tied to Iran. Actions delist or adjust other entries periodically while adding high-risk players. Global firms monitor these updates to avoid secondary sanctions penalties. OFAC maintains pressure on Iran-Russia evasion tactics through targeted designations.

### Source Context
@ofacalert (OFAC Alert) covers this category of developments. The account focuses on ofac treasury sanctions designation iran russia sdn list new enforcement.
